roa.docketEntryComment: DA NON OPPO TO DEF PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE-FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOT W/DRAW PLEA & VACATE JUDGMENT & PC1385 DISMISS FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/NP/X: DEFENDANT'S WAIVER OF HIS PERSONAL PRESENCE IN COURT PER PC 977(A)(1) IS FILED INCOURT,/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 11-30-92 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY  CODE SECTION 11352(A), ENTERED 11-04-92, IS VACATED AND A NEW  PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDINGCOUNT 2, A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH2:CJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA//CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP//DISM3/NUNCDAT: 11-30-92/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
SPN INT SW-CASTANEDA/A;DEFT ADV PERS CONSTL RTS WVD;DEFT STIP VIOL PROB
SPN INT SW-R/WARNER;PD APPTD;REF APD S/R TO BE FILED 1/12/95;REMANDEDTRANSF TO D26 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 9AM ON 1/19/95
